findings.detail: All five cycle-1 findings resolved: MSG1/MSG2 labels shortened to 2 words ('user turn', 'assistant turn'); KEY reclassified from hitl (yellow) to act (blue); bare KEY→REQ arrow with no edge label; CLAUDE subtitle trimmed to single-line 'reads request, returns response'; all subtitle font-sizes raised to 12px. Layout renders cleanly as a TB decomposition tree with 8 nodes, no overlaps, no truncation, and all subtitles legible at viewer scale.

preflight.concept_fidelity: pass — all nodes map to headline scope (model, messages, system, user prompt, authentication)
preflight.title_discipline: pass — title in frontmatter config block, no ghost node
preflight.single_path_discipline: n/a — anatomy/decomposition tree, branching is correct for intent

visual_checks.layout_wrong_for_intent: pass — TB correct for top-down anatomy decomposition
visual_checks.whitespace_imbalance: pass — asymmetry is content-driven (leaf vs. parent nodes), not a layout defect
visual_checks.subtitle_illegible: pass — 12px subtitles legible at viewer scale
visual_checks.color_tier_violation: pass — KEY correctly reclassified to act (blue); no hitl misuse
visual_checks.edge_label_collision: pass — 'alternates' and 'sent over HTTPS' labels positioned cleanly
